---

## How to Apply These Settings

1. Go to: https://github.com/AbuAzad2025/UAE-Sale/settings
2. In "About" section (top right):
   - Add description
   - Add website URL
   - Add topics (click "Add topics")
3. Save changes

---

## Recommended Settings

### General
- ✅ Include in the public repository search results
- ✅ Restrict editing to collaborators only
- ❌ Allow forking (keep disabled for proprietary)

### Features
- ✅ Wikis (optional - for documentation)
- ✅ Issues (for client support)
- ❌ Sponsorships (already configured via FUNDING.yml)
- ✅ Projects (optional - for roadmap)

### Pull Requests
- ✅ Allow merge commits
- ✅ Allow squash merging
- ✅ Allow rebase merging

### Security
- ✅ Private vulnerability reporting
- ✅ Dependabot alerts
